## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off ProjectMark and GrowthX Labs content marketing engagement](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ProjectMark currently sees 100-200 qualified weekly sessions, with \~3% conversion to MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Target audience: General contractors (50-500 employees), MEP subcontractors; roles include directors of business development/marketing/pre-construction, CEOs, senior project managers, chief estimators](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver calibration articles next week, aiming to start publishing the following week](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [GrowthX will use AI-powered workflows to identify content opportunities, create assignments, and produce high-volume, relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

## Topics

### Current Traffic and Conversion Metrics

  - [100-200 qualified weekly sessions (filtered from \~900 total sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [\~3% conversion rate to MQLs (Marketing Qualified Leads)](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [MQLs primarily come from "See it in action" demo video CTA](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Data sourced from Hotjar with custom filters applied](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Target Audience and Content Strategy

  - [Primary focus: General contractors (80% of business), 50-500 employees](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Secondary: MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) subcontractors](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Key roles: Directors (Business Development, Marketing, Pre-construction), CEOs, VPs, Senior Project Managers, Chief Estimators](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing technical content with sales-oriented material in a B2B construction context](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Opportunity: Explore pre-construction content, leveraging past success in this area](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Content Competitors and Mindshare

  - [Direct competitors: Unanet, Buildertrend, Procore, AEC360](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Indirect/content competitors: Monday.com, Salesforce, Pipeline CRM](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Strategy: Create comparison content positioning ProjectMark against larger competitors](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Opportunity: Target location-based searches (e.g., "general contractors in San Francisco") to reach both potential customers and their clients](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)

### GrowthX Content Production Process

1.  Competitive keyword gap analysis
2.  Relevance and difficulty scoring for keyword opportunities
3.  Creation of detailed content assignments
4.  Prioritization and weekly content production
5.  Ongoing monitoring and content enrichment

### Next Steps for Engagement

1.  ProjectMark to send additional documentation and preferred content examples
2.  GrowthX to process provided information and adapt workflows
3.  GrowthX to deliver 1-2 calibration articles by next week
4.  ProjectMark to provide CMS access and schedule a 15-minute walkthrough
5.  Begin content publication the week following calibration

## Next Steps

  - [Tom to review and update the Notion document with additional website links and content examples](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=2754.0)
  - [ProjectMark to send internal documents and PDFs about customer classification](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver calibration articles by next week](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=2685.0)
  - [Schedule CMS walkthrough with GrowthX team (Jimmy Sedera + one other)](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=2718.0)
  - [Provide CMS access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/TA7QPTo9r1JUApy7WFp9haD4CDuz6ahz?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
